description:
Read recent frontend console log entries captured from a Locus View host window. Use it to inspect runtime errors, warnings, and debug output.
- When Headroom is enabled and output exceeds the compress threshold, large log output is compressed through headroom-ai (requires headroom proxy or HEADROOM_API_KEY).

viewId.description: View id whose frontend.log should be read.

limit.description: Maximum entries to return. Defaults to 20 and is capped by the backend.

level.description: Optional log level filter: debug, log, info, warn, or error.

contains.description: Optional case-insensitive substring filter for log messages.
